query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_accounts) as total_accounts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts) as total_posts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts WHERE isViral = 1) as viral_posts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts WHERE isSuperViral = 1) as super_viral_posts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_success_factors) as total_success_factors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_viral_rules) as total_global_rules,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_post_embeddings) as total_embeddings;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kBbSiy1U7nUuYR.eb235af310e4 --database ZwXGmk4u6xh72xjKSDXePb --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_accounts) as total_accounts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts) as total_posts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts WHERE isViral = 1) as viral_posts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts WHERE isSuperViral = 1) as super_viral_posts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_success_factors) as total_success_factors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_viral_rules) as total_global_rules,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_post_embeddings) as total_embeddings;
